# UC-13.1.58 · Prometheus Target Metadata Label Limit Violations

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Configuration, Data Quality &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch the metric stack and its limits so we notice scrape, storage, and query pressure before charts lie or go empty.*

---

## Description

Invalid targets are dropped silently without log monitoring.

## Value

Catches mis-instrumented exporters before dashboards go blank.

## Implementation

Pair with `prometheus_sd_discovered_targets` metric trends if available.

## SPL

```spl
index=prometheus sourcetype="prometheus:log"
| search "label" AND ("limit" OR "exceeded" OR "too many")
| stats count by host
| where count>=3
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (host × count), Timeline.

## Known False Positives

Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.

## References

- [Prometheus documentation — monitoring Prometheus](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/troubleshooting/)
- [Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/observability/en/gdi/opentelemetry/opentelemetry.html)
